final_prompt.prompt:

Color palette:
Materials/textures:
Text (verbatim):
Constraints:
  use the water bottle provided in the attached image
  no logo on the bottle
  match the overall visual direction of the reference pattern image
Avoid: adding any logo or branding to the bottle
